name: exchange_rate
description: Get exchange rate between two currencies. Default: USD → RUB. Supports any ISO 4217 currency code.

name: translate

source.description: Source language code (default: auto), e.g. en, ru, de, fr, es

target.description: Target language code (default: ru), e.g. ru, en, de, fr, es

description: Translate text between languages using MyMemory API. Supports 100+ languages.

name: weather

city.description: City name (supports Cyrillic, e.g. Москва, Саратов)

description: Get current weather for any city. Returns temperature, humidity, wind, and description.
